subcodes.first_line: O God! O Thou Who art the Possessor of grandeur and majesty, of might and transcendence! Thou dost exalt whom Thou willest and strengthen whom Thou pleasest [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اللهم یا ذا العظمه و الکبریاء و العزه و العلی تعز من تشاء و توید من تشاء
subcodes.subjects: @station of the Manifestation of God, @prayer for protection, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
